title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, June 23 2026
summary:
Main
Bulkers: VV Bulker values remained mostly stable across all bulker sectors. Newcastlemax and Capesize values drifted marginallylower while Handysize saw positive movement especially for resales. Panamax Mont Blanc Hawk (81,600 DWT, 2017, Imabari) sold by Eiko Kisen for USD 32.8 mil, VV Value USD 31.1 mil.
